title: Redefined Craftings
description: More & Improved craftings and uncraftings added into Vanilla.
body:
### **Redefined Craftings** 
adds and changes existing recipes in minecraft for some of the items which require more but give less. It is also provided with some new crafting recipes also. For a kick start in survival world, this helps you get the things done correct and effective.

## Main Crafts - v2
![Uncraft it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/931df0c01a77b50f3e95285732e2e4457ac91a9a.png)

**You can now uncraft Diamond, Gold and Iron Armors back into their ingots.**


![You can craft Stone tools with all type of stones in minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43d183664e4c0287c575ed20eae087ed59f9b145.png)

You can now craft **Stone Tools** with all type of stones in minecraft.
From now, The blocks like **Stone, Deepslate, Granite, Diorite**... can be used for crafting stone tools.

![Raw Ingot Blocks can smelt directly through furnace.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7776e815bd979d9b14631bf4cf71d1895202e3b.png)

Raw Ingot Blocks like _raw iron block, raw copper block_ and _raw gold block_ can now be directly smelted through a furnace.

![in this datapack, there is also new Lodestone recipe for 1.21.5. and many more. Download it and enjoy it!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db81aa8a0ecc1fd7767c45adb4c01006d4c97937.png)

We can craft new 1.21.5 **Lodestone** on 1.21.X (any versions). Save that one Netherite Ingot <3.
